# elizaos-plugins/plugin-evm Daily Update (Apr 17, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 17, 2026, focused on expanding network compatibility for the EVM plugin, with a new pull request initiated to integrate support for the Radius Network.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Network Integration**
    *   Initiated support for the Radius Network (eip155:723487) to expand the plugin's ecosystem reach. [#29](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-evm/pull/29)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#29](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-evm/pull/29) feat: add Radius Network support (eip155:723487) - Currently open and awaiting review.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
